layout_note: Standard (non-transposed) Schedule A grid continuation. Two portfolio blocks: 'Grandchildren Trust' (7 DC-owned funds) and 'ARECO LP' with sub-trust group rows '- Ritu Ahuja 1995 Trust' and '- Grandchildren Trust' (MAI funds + Park Center Plaza, mixed SP/DC). All asset rows have EIF (Excepted Investment Fund) checked. Most rows show 'PTRN' written in the Block C Other Type of Income column (partnership income); MLP Fund shows NONE, and the two MAI Wealth IG Fund rows show a Block C income checkbox plus a Block D amount. Transaction column (Block E) empty for all rows. Block B value columns and Block D amount columns sit over heavy grey shading; exact value bucket is low-confidence. Block B: A=None,B=$1-$1,000,C=$1,001-$15,000,D=$15,001-$50,000,E=$50,001-$100,000,F=$100,001-$250,000,G=$250,001-$500,000,H=$500,001-$1,000,000,I=$1,000,001-$5,000,000,J=$5,000,001-$25,000,000,K=$25,000,001-$50,000,000,L=Over $50,000,000,M=Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000. Block D: I=None,II=$1-$200,III=$201-$1,000,IV=$1,001-$2,500,V=$2,501-$5,000,VI=$5,001-$15,000,VII=$15,001-$50,000,VIII=$50,001-$100,000,IX=$100,001-$1,000,000,X=$1,000,001-$5,000,000,XI=Over $5,000,000,XII=Spouse/DC Asset with income over $1,000,000.

uncertainties.note: Block B value columns are heavily shaded; exact value bucket is low-confidence for every asset row

MAI Wealth IG Fund (SP and DC) show a Block C income checkbox in an early column plus a substantial Block D amount; the exact income type is unclear (could be NONE, DIVIDENDS, or CAPITAL GAINS) - recorded DIVIDENDS as best guess
Kayne Anderson EF VI amount X reads far-right in Block D; could be a lower bucket (shading)
MAI Capital Income and Growth III (SP) value X is at far-right of Block B; could be col J, L, or the M spouse column
amount X's for EF VI, Resilience IV, MAI Wealth SP/DC, MAI Capital rows and Park Center Plaza fall in the shaded right half of Block D; adjacent-column errors possible
